action.reasoning: Observation: Best test=0.4663 (3-way ensemble). 6.9h, 9 iters left. Each L/14 epoch ~5 min. Africa is always worst region. Analysis: To meaningfully improve, train a NEW diverse model with different seed and stronger Africa upweighting, then ensemble all models. A 10-epoch L/14 run = ~50 min. Then ensemble + eval = 2 iters total. Decision: Launch a diverse training run with seed=42, region_balance=0.8 (strong), starting from scratch (not resume) for diversity. Use existing train.py.
